message:
fix(clippy): address clippy warnings in pt-telemetry and pt-core

- Replace map_or(false, ..) with is_some_and(..) for cleaner code
- Use struct initializer syntax with ..Default::default() instead of
  field assignment after Default::default()
- Remove unused BeliefState import in shadow_leak_repro test
- Add parse_proc_stat_content to collect module exports for test access
- Replace useless format!() with String literal .to_string()
- Remove unnecessary borrow on owned value

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
